title: French mum and partner held until trial after sons abandoned by road in Portugal
summary_full: The couple, who allegedly left the woman's sons on a roadside in southern Portugal, will remain in custody.
summary_public: The couple, who allegedly left the woman's sons on a roadside in southern Portugal, will remain in custody.
